50.reason: [Missing return statement causes undefined behavior; function should return the root pointer after recursive calls]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing return statement causes undefined behavior; function should return the root pointer after recursive calls]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function tree_add is missing a return statement in the non-base case, leading to undefined behavior. The commented-out 'return root;' must be uncommented to correctly return the updated subtree root.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [The function tree_add is missing a return statement in the non-base case, leading to undefined behavior. The commented-out 'return root;' must be uncommented to correctly return the (possibly modified) root pointer.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing return statement causes undefined behavior; function must return a value in all paths]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [The function is missing a return statement in the non-base case, leading to undefined behavior. The function must return 'root' after recursive calls to properly build the tree.]
